description: Use this API to purge GIC User 1D Earth Model data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_earth1d_usr_purg(name)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: 1d earth model name. the non-blank alphanumeric identifier assigned to earth model. the name should be unique and different than standard earth model names defined in tpl-007. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
